narrative:
Braceville Twp C (precinct in Trumbull County) has 880 registered voters, with 58.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 18.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 23.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 5.6 percentage points.
